action.reasoning: Observation: Best AP is 0.2190 from iter 23 with similar FP+MLP (2048 hidden, 6 layers). Recent runs show regression to ~0.204 on test despite val AP ~0.224 and low training loss indicating overfitting. No recent training curves due to missing jsonl logs and truncation. PyG remains broken. Analysis: Adding normalized RDKit molecular descriptors (10 dims) to the 4096-bit r2+r3 Morgan FP provides complementary global molecular properties, potentially improving generalization on the multi-task bioassay prediction. Updating to dropout=0.1, input_dim=4106, full complete training code with per-epoch metrics.jsonl logging, gradient clipping, seed, and ReduceLROnPlateau(patience=25) should help. 120 epochs sufficient given fast iterations. Decision: Rewrite all three files with descriptor integration, updated defaults, complete non-truncated robust train.py including jsonl logging for curves. Train with new setup then submit_eval on best checkpoint to aim for AP >0.219.
